data.title: Asia-Pacific electric construction and agriculture equipment market valued at $1.85B in 2024, projected to reach $5.89B by 2030, with a CAGR of 21.11%.
data.description: Dublin - ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included "Asia-Pacific Electric Construction and Agriculture Equipment Market by Country, Competition, Forecast & Opportunities, 2020-2030F" in its offerings. The market in Asia-Pacific had a value of USD 1.85 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow to USD 5.89 billion by 2030, boasting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 21.11%. There is rapid expansion in this market, fueled by swift urban development and increasing environmental regulations.

data.title: ExxonMobil faces competition from China in Europe, plans to sell parts of chemical business. $1 billion in divestments possible.
data.description: ExxonMobil's stock (NYSE: XOM) saw a decline on Friday following reports suggesting the company's intention to sell portions of its European chemical business. This move comes amid challenges within the industry, including U.S. tariffs, high energy expenses, and increased competition from China. ExxonMobil has been actively reducing its presence in Europe, often facing disagreements with Brussels regarding regulatory practices that the company believes are inflating energy costs and deterring potential investors. Existing agreements include the sale of its French chemical operations and majority stake in Esso SAF to the French unit of Canadian retailer North Atlantic. Additionally, ExxonMobil is in discussions with advisers about potential divestments that could generate around $1 billion, as reported by the Financial Times. Moreover, there are talks of ExxonMobil aiming to re-enter the Russian market, with negotiations underway with Rosneft. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Broadcom's strong quarterly report drives stock surge on robust AI chip business growth.
data.description: Following an outstanding quarterly report and impressive performance in its AI chip business, Broadcom saw a significant surge in its stock. The company's earnings exceeded expectations, leading to a rise in its stock value. Broadcom highlighted the strength of its AI chip business, which played a key role in driving the positive results. The market responded positively to these developments, leading to a sharp increase in the company's stock price.

data.title: NASA is seeking early career and senior scientists for prestigious fellowships at locations across the U.S. Apply by Nov 1, 2025 for opportunities to develop advancements in science, tech, aeronautics, and space exploration. ORAU manages the program for NASA.
data.description: In Oak Ridge, Tennessee, NASA is offering fellowship opportunities for early-career and senior scientists to contribute to advancements in science, technology, aeronautics, and space exploration. The deadline to apply for these fellowships is November 1, 2025. Interested individuals can learn more and submit applications for the NASA Postdoctoral Program (NPP), which is managed by ORAU. The program aims to provide scientific and technological fellowships for researchers to engage in NASA's mission.
